creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 256524
Patch file

Update to 3.1.0

ChangeLog:      https://github.com/certbot/certbot/releases/tag/v3.1.0

* Build of all updated ports succeeds with poudriere and 14.2-RELEASE amd64 jail.
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-acme test` is "243 passed, 22 warnings".
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-certbot test` is "993 passed, 28 skipped, 1 warning".
